SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE I, PAGE 1, PART I, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DESK AND ON-SITE MONITORING VISITS, WRITTEN POLICY AND PROCEDURE, ANNUAL REPORTS. PERIODIC AUDITFROM STATE AUDITOR, LAST COMPLETED 9/2019, MONTHLY FINANCIAL REPORTING WITH BOARD APPROVAL.
ALL BY-LAWS AND POLOCIES WERE UPDATED
ORGANIZATION'S FISCAL/ADMINISTRATION COMMITTEE AND FULL BOARD HAS REVIEWED THE 990 BEFORE FILING.

CONFLICTS OF INTEREST ARE DISCLOSED AS REQUIRED BY POLICY. BOARD MEMBERS CANNOT VOTE ON FUNDING WHERE THE ARE CONFLICTS OF INTEREST. THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST IS DOCUMENTED IN MINUTES, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR AND BOARD CHAIR CLOSELY MONITOR AND ADDRESS ANY ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST.
FOLLOW OFFICE OF ADMINISTRATIONS DIVISION OF PERSONNEL'S POLICIES. ALL RECOMMENDATIONS ARE APPROVED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS.
ALL GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

AveragingAttachment.ExplanationTxt: FORM 5768 WAS FILED TO BE EFFECT FOR TAX YEAR ENDING 6/30/2018 SO DOES NOT PERTAIN TO PRIOR YEARS.
